arts.ttl: Brighton vs Man City - Premier League: Live score, team news and updates as Pep Guardiola's side look to bounce back from defeat to move ahead of title rivals Liverpool
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest score, team news and updates as Brighton host Manchester City in Premier League action from the Amex Stadium ahead of the international break.

arts.ttl: Cody Gakpo says Liverpool have a player on their books who is just so underrated
arts.sum: Liverpool have a number of seriously underrated players in their squad. Glen Johnson stated last season that Alexis Mac Allister is the most underrated player...

arts.sum: Our writers pick their teams for the clash between Liverpool and Aston Villa on Saturday

arts.ttl: How to watch Liverpool vs Aston Villa - TV channel, live stream details and kick-off time
arts.sum: Arne Slot's Liverpool have enjoyed an astonishing start to the season and sit at the top of the Premier League table

arts.ttl: Cody Gakpo drops early Liverpool team news hint for Aston Villa amid major Arne Slot call
arts.sum: The latest Liverpool news before their Premier League clash against Aston Villa with Cody Gakpo eager to start a fourth consecutive game.

arts.ttl: How you can meet Brian Little as Aston Villa legend explains reasons behind exciting new project
arts.sum: Andy Blair will host the evening, joined by Brian himself, who will share the story behind Little Legends and the inspiration for his autobiographical series, which captures positive messages for children striving to reach their dreams. "About five years ago, at the age of 65, I decided to start writing stories inspired by my life—a schoolboy with big dreams of becoming a footballer," Brian said.

arts.ttl: Steven Gerrard's Saudi Arabia nightmare takes fresh twist as Liverpool legend handed new blow
arts.sum: Steven Gerrard's Al-Ettifaq side were beaten 3-1 by Al-Hilal on Friday night, with the Liverpool legend coming in for criticism from the Saudi club's supporters

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk agrees with Arne Slot over 'important' Luis Diaz role in Liverpool team
arts.sum: Luis Diaz scored a hat-trick after starting as a central striker against Bayer Leverkusen and could begin in the role again vs Aston Villa

arts.ttl: Arne Slot sends plea to Liverpool fans for Aston Villa clash after what they did vs Bayer Leverkusen
arts.sum: Arne Slot has asked supporters to repeat what they did in the games vs Brighton and Bayer Leverkusen for tonight's fixture against Aston Villa.
